case_title: COLLINS, GEOFFREY M. MD. VS SALANSANG,LILIAN IDBA BAY AREA PHYSICIANS SERVICES et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SALANSANG,LILIAN IDBA BAY AREA PHYSICIANS SERVICES BELTRAN,ROMULO IDBA BAY AREA PHYSICIANS SERVICES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT COLLINS, GEOFFREY M. MD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY COLLINS, GEOFFREY M. MD. AS TO DEFENDANT SALANSANG,LILIAN IDBA BAY AREA PHYSICIANS SERVICES BELTRAN,ROMULO IDBA BAY AREA PHYSICIANS SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-22-1998, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO NOV-18-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF COLLINS, GEOFFREY M. MD.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COLLINS, GEOFFREY M. MD. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALANSANG,LILIAN IDBA BAY AREA PHYSICIANS SERVICES BELTRAN,ROMULO IDBA BAY AREA PHYSICIANS SERVICES $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,055.00, NO SERVICE ON DEFT. BELTRAN, ROMULO IND/DBA BAY AREA PHYSICIAN'S SERVICES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
